name: Kloudfuse
description: Unified observability platform running fully in customers VPC with Datadog-compatible API and OpenTelemetry ingest.

seo.title: Kloudfuse — Observability / Logging / Tracing
seo.meta_description: Kloudfuse: Unified observability platform running fully in customers VPC with Datadog-compatible API and OpenTelemetry ingest.

when_to_use: Datadog-compatible observability running in your own VPC
OpenTelemetry ingestion with no data leaving your cloud
Unified metrics, logs, and traces with Datadog API parity
Cost-efficient observability at Datadog scale internally

pros: Runs entirely in customer VPC for data sovereignty
Predictable cost vs Datadog metered pricing
cons: Dashboard library less rich than incumbents
review.verdict: Excellent choice for regulated teams fleeing Datadog costs, if you have the ops muscle to run it.
review.best_for: Regulated or data-sovereign enterprises wanting Datadog UX without vendor hosting.
review.not_for: Small teams without Kubernetes and ops capacity to operate the platform.
